postLists.title: Resource Published in Ch-1 Geographical Diversity of India,RESOURCES UPLOADED

postLists.content:
A GENTLE REMINDER



🎉✨ LET THE HOUSE SPIRIT BEGIN!✨🎉

Dear Students,

As we step into an exciting new academic session 2026–27, it’s time to gear up for one of the most thrilling parts — INTER-HOUSE COMPETITIONS!

Get ready to showcase your talent, explore your interests, and shine like never before! Whether you’re an artist, a performer, a sportsperson, or a thinker — there’s something for everyone!

Here’s what you need to do:
You will be choosing TWO competitions for the session:
➡️ ONE from Section A
➡️ ONE from Section B

SECTION A – Choose ANY ONE

Art 🎨 | Music 🎶 | English 📖 | Science 🌿 |
Sports 🏏 (Cricket, Tennis, Swimming, Yoga) |
Math 🔢 | French 🇫🇷

SECTION B – Choose ANY ONE

Dance 💃 | Theatre 🎬 |
Sports ⚽ (Football, Table Tennis, Badminton, Basketball) |
Hindi 📚 | ICT 💻 | Sanskrit 🪔, SSC
Talent wins games, but teamwork and participation win hearts!

So think wisely, choose what excites you, and get ready to represent your house with passion and pride!

Fill in the Google Form and submit your choices today as the last date was April 12, 2026.

Google form link : https://forms.gle/tkUT69FsT8QnsY9d6

Let the competition begin… may the best house win!

Dear Parent

PFA the PTM Circular for the PTM scheduled for 18th April, 2026.

Kindly ack in the almanac as the slots have been shared by the Class Teacher

Thank you

postLists.content:
Dear Goenkans
PFA the Practice Worksheet 1 of Multiplication of Fractions- To be done in the Math NB.
Will discuss the same on Monday.
Submission Date: 15th April, 2026.
Thank you

postLists.content:
🎉✨ LET THE HOUSE SPIRIT BEGIN!✨🎉

Dear Students,

As we step into an exciting new academic session 2026–27, it’s time to gear up for one of the most thrilling parts — INTER-HOUSE COMPETITIONS!

Get ready to showcase your talent, explore your interests, and shine like never before! Whether you’re an artist, a performer, a sportsperson, or a thinker — there’s something for everyone!

Here’s what you need to do:
You will be choosing TWO competitions for the session:
➡️ ONE from Section A
➡️ ONE from Section B

SECTION A – Choose ANY ONE

Art 🎨 | Music 🎶 | English 📖 | Science 🌿 |
Sports 🏏 (Cricket, Tennis, Swimming, Yoga) |
Math 🔢 | French 🇫🇷

SECTION B – Choose ANY ONE

Dance 💃 | Theatre 🎬 |
Sports ⚽ (Football, Table Tennis, Badminton, Basketball) |

Talent wins games, but teamwork and participation win hearts!

So think wisely, choose what excites you, and get ready to represent your house with passion and pride!

Fill in the Google Form and submit your choices by Sunday, 12 April 2026.

Google form link :

https://forms.gle/tkUT69FsT8QnsY9d6

Let the competition begin… may the best house win!

Dear Parents,

A gentle reminder to kindly follow the steps to fill in the ID card format to ensure printing of the new ID cards. A document is being attached for your reference.

Please ignore if already completed.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Dear Goenkans

Please note the REVIEW work for today - ONLINE QUIZ ON MULTIPLICATION OF FRACTIONS. Kindly attempt it and share your performance score with your Math Teacher.

https://wayground.com/join/quiz/5f298d5cd7eef9001b58c754/start?studentShare=true

Dear Goenkans

Sharing the MLP notes of Ch 8-Working with Fractions.

HW: Complete the key points given on Pg 10 in Math Algebra Notebook.

Thank you

Dear Students
Complete Practice Q-2 in the ENGLISH notebook.

PRACTICE QUESTION 2
Write a descriptive paragraph (100-120 words) on Virat Kohli. Include details about his early life, cricket career, achievements, and personality. Use descriptive words and phrases to make your paragraph interesting and engaging. Use adjectives
• Born on 5 November 1988 in Delhi, India Showed interest in cricket from a young age
Known for aggressive batting style and determination
Became captain of the Indian cricket team
• Achieved numerous records in international cricket
Awarded several cricketing honors, including ICC awards Disciplined, hardworking, and passionate about the game
• Inspires young cricketers and fans worldwide
• Leads by example on and off the field

Dear Students
A gentle reminder to fill the google form for club choices as the link will be deactivated by 8 pm today.
As the test is scheduled for AI, makers space and stemplify club tomorrow.
Thank you

Dear Goenkans

Please carry one notebook for each subject along with your almanac and stationery.

We shall be sharing the Time Table for the fortnight with you on Monday.

Thank you

Dear Parents,

Kindly take a moment to fill in the form shared in the link below.

https://forms.gle/9bKAbbYWpy1i65V36

Your response is important and required for us to proceed smoothly. We would appreciate your cooperation in completing it at the earliest.

Thank you for your support.

Dear Students

The Club selection Google form for  the academic session 2026-27 is shared. All the students are requested to fill the form latest by Monday, April 6th. Kindly fill the form carefully as one entry per child will be accepted.

Google form link for reference - https://forms.gle/LxjNcRM71P2yqsQa6


Thank You

Dear Parent
This is a gentle reminder for the Online class Induction on April 4, 2026 at 9 am .
Kindly find the link for the google meet.

Link: https://meet.google.com/uhj-ihhg-caw

The duration of the presentation will be approximately 35 minutes.

Thank you

Duration of the session will be approximately 35 minutes.


The online link shall be shared with you tomorrow.
Thank you
